sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15107" key="a)ristogalati/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀριστο-γᾰλᾰτίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, title of <sense id="n15107.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chief citizen of the province of Galatia, Class.Rev.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.214</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
